title: chrysosplenium macrostemon var. macrostemon
intro: Chrysosplenium macrostemon var. macrostemon, also known as Chinese golden saxifrage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium macrostemon var. macrostemon include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues, as well as other conditions such as arthritis and skin problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
